AdapterInitiativeDriveState.description: Compact initiative-drive state used in the always-on adapter stream.

price_low.description: Lower boundary of the drive path.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper boundary of the drive path.
price_high.title: Price High

aggressive_volume.description: Aggressive volume attributed to the drive.
aggressive_volume.title: Aggressive Volume

consumed_price_levels.description: How many price levels were consumed.
consumed_price_levels.title: Consumed Price Levels

max_counter_move_ticks.description: Largest counter move while the drive was active.

continuation_seconds.description: Continuation duration after the initial release.

AdapterPostHarvestResponseState.description: Compact post-harvest state used after a liquidity objective has been reached.

harvest_subject_id.description: Observed subject that completed the harvest.
harvest_subject_id.title: Harvest Subject Id

harvest_subject_kind.description: Kind of observed subject that completed the harvest.
harvest_subject_kind.title: Harvest Subject Kind

harvest_side.description: Directional side of the completed harvest move.

harvest_completed_at.description: When the harvest was considered complete.
harvest_completed_at.title: Harvest Completed At

harvested_price_low.description: Lower bound of the harvested price zone.
harvested_price_low.title: Harvested Price Low

harvested_price_high.description: Upper bound of the harvested price zone.
harvested_price_high.title: Harvested Price High

completion_ratio.description: Observed completion ratio for the targeted liquidity pocket.
completion_ratio.title: Completion Ratio

continuation_ticks_after_completion.description: Additional same-side travel after the harvest completed, in ticks.
continuation_ticks_after_completion.title: Continuation Ticks After Completion

consolidation_range_ticks.description: Observed consolidation width after the harvest completed, in ticks.
consolidation_range_ticks.title: Consolidation Range Ticks

pullback_ticks.description: Largest pullback after the harvest completed, in ticks.
pullback_ticks.title: Pullback Ticks

reversal_ticks.description: Largest opposite-direction reversal after the harvest completed, in ticks.
reversal_ticks.title: Reversal Ticks

seconds_to_first_pullback.description: Seconds between harvest completion and the first meaningful pullback.
seconds_to_first_pullback.title: Seconds To First Pullback

seconds_to_reversal.description: Seconds between harvest completion and the strongest reversal print.
seconds_to_reversal.title: Seconds To Reversal

reached_next_opposing_liquidity.description: Whether price reached the next opposing liquidity after completing the harvest.
reached_next_opposing_liquidity.title: Reached Next Opposing Liquidity

next_opposing_liquidity_price.description: Observed price of the next opposing liquidity pocket when it was reached.
next_opposing_liquidity_price.title: Next Opposing Liquidity Price

post_harvest_delta.description: Net delta observed after completion inside the response window.
post_harvest_delta.title: Post Harvest Delta

outcome.description: Observed outcome after the liquidity harvest completed.

distance_from_price_ticks.description: Distance from current price in ticks.
